rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the `True` placeholder fields in `ReductiveGroup` and `SemisimpleGroup` (visible in the diff at lines ~60-67) will silently break downstream instance constructors when replaced by real conditions, with no experimental marking or deprecation path; the one-line doc-comment fix is real, minimal, and maintainer-worthy. Review 2's clean-approve misses this forward-looking API lifecycle concern that sits squarely within the deprecation rubric.
